name: peach-guitar-tuner
description: Static Peach guitar tuner PWA with optional Node.js global tuning API backend.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check config.js && node --check server/tuning-utils.js && node --check server/tuning-store.js && node --check server/ai-lookup.js && node --check server/tuning-api.js && node --check server/start.js && node --check dev/global-tuning-api-mock.js && node --check tests/global-tuning-api.test.js
